markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.057 — Evidence that Does Not Fulfill Requirements; Suspension

If evidence filed with the department does not continue to fulfill the purpose for which it was required, the department shall suspend the driver’s license and all vehicle registrations or nonresident’s operating privilege of the person who filed the evidence pending the filing of other evidence of financial responsibility.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: If evidence filed with the department does not continue to fulfill the purpose for which it was required, the department shall suspend the driver’s license and all vehicle registrations or nonresident’s operating privilege of the person who filed the evidence pending the filing of other evidence of financial responsibility.
